title: Demons at Work
description: A satirical horror novelette narrated by a mid-career demon in hell's Hauntings department. The premise: horror movie tropes are a demon's actual job, and the job makes no sense from the inside. First-person, dry humor, deadpan. The horror set pieces are genuinely well-crafted; the comedy comes from the demon's backstage perspective. Underneath: a meditation on doing harmful work well inside an institution whose purpose nobody can defend.
